items.headline: Up 23% From Its 52-Week Low: 1 Critical Metric That Explains Why I’m Standing Pat on Coca-Cola Stock
items.summary: At $80.91, Coca-Cola (NYSE:KO) sits in a holding pattern. Shares have rallied roughly 23% off the 52-week low and now trade where high risk-free Treasury yields are squeezing defensive staple multiples.
